title: Christella moulmaynensis
taxonomy: Christella moulmaynensis is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of the world. This plant is part of the genus Christella, which contains several species of ferns found in various parts of the globe. The classification of Christella moulmaynensis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. The specific classification of Christella moulmaynensis is a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to change as new information becomes available.
